{{CargoClone
|name=Kungfu Rat
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=181
|gene1={race} DEF +50
|gene2={race} FAME +50
|gene3=Per 10% HP lost, {race} DEF +60
|gene4=Per 60 Zombie Minions in battle:
> Troop Earth DMG +6
|gene5=Zombie Minion Recovery SPD +1.5%
|gene6=Per 60 Zombie Minions in battle:
> Troop Earth DMG +10
|gene7=Zombie Minion Recovery SPD +2.5%
|}}
